---
title: "vector_shadow.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\vector_shadow.py"
loc: 11
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.47
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.54
---

## Intent
The `vector_shadow.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on VectorShadow, __init__, search, build_index. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via VectorShadow, __init__, search, build_index. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `VectorShadow`
- `__init__`
- `search`
- `build_index`
